contentBlocks.original:
समुद्रवसने देवि पर्वतस्तनमण्डले
विष्णुपत्नि नमस्तुभ्यं पादस्पर्शं क्षमस्वमे
contentBlocks.transliteration:
samudravasane devi parvatastanamaṇḍale
viṣṇupatni namastubhyaṃ pādasparśaṃ kṣamasvame
contentBlocks.translation: O Goddess who is clothed with the ocean and whose bosom is adorned by the mountains, wife of Lord Vishnu, I bow to you. Please forgive me for touching you with my feet.
contentBlocks.meanings: समुद्रवसने (samudravasane) – clothed with the ocean (samudra:ocean | vasane:clothed with); देवि (devi) – O Goddess; पर्वतस्तनमण्डले (parvatastanamaṇḍale) – bosom adorned by mountains (parvata:mountain | stana:bosom | maṇḍale:adorned by); विष्णुपत्नि (viṣṇupatni) – wife of Lord Vishnu (viṣṇu:Vishnu | patni:wife); नमः (namaḥ) – I bow; तुभ्यम् (tubhyam) – to you; पादस्पर्शं (pādasparśaṃ) – touching with feet (pāda:feet | sparśaṃ:touching); क्षमस्व (kṣamasva) – forgive; मे (me) – me;
